simplePromptRandomization.direction: Turn every short instruction into a fresh wallpaper concept with a random content twist, composition, scene logic, mood, palette, viewpoint, and one small surprise detail.

contentTwist: a quiet everyday moment made visually special
a tiny story implied by one object in the scene
a seasonal variation that changes the emotional temperature
a playful contrast between subject and environment
a calm cinematic snapshot just before something cute happens
a cozy still-life arrangement around the main subject
a gentle magical-realism touch that stays subtle
a fresh editorial interpretation of the user's idea
composition: wide negative space on one side for desktop icons
lower-third subject placement with a calm open upper area
centered subject with soft breathing room around it
diagonal light or shadow leading toward the subject
minimal scene with a single clear focal point
foreground detail with spacious softly blurred background
symmetrical wallpaper layout with uncluttered edges
large clean background plane with subject offset to one third
viewpoint: macro foreground with clean distant background
palette: warm cream, pale apricot, soft sage
powder blue, cloud white, muted gold
lavender gray, pearl white, dusty pink
mint green, butter yellow, warm ivory
soft coral, sky blue, oatmeal beige
pale peach, moss green, linen white
rose beige, smoky gray, honey gold
textureDetail: soft fur or natural fiber detail
barely visible dust motes in light
surpriseDetail: one tiny object that rewards a second look
a small reflection that changes the scene
a tiny prop related to the subject
a subtle shape made by light or shadow
one seasonal detail near the edge
a small cozy object in the far background
a playful detail that does not clutter the wallpaper

retention.macos: Finder move to trash or FileManager trashItem
retention.windows: Recycle Bin through native shell API

demo.name: Cute Cat Wallpapers
demo.userInstruction: 월페이퍼용으로 다양한 귀여운 고양이 이미지를 만들어줘. 매번 다른 품종, 자세, 표정, 계절감, 배경 분위기가 나오게 하고, 너무 복잡하지 않은 깔끔한 desktop wallpaper 구도로 만들어줘. 텍스트, 로고, 워터마크는 넣지 말고, 화면 아이콘이 잘 보이도록 여백과 부드러운 색감을 유지해줘.

promptVariation.direction: Make every scheduled run feel like a small surprise: clearly different cat, setting, palette, and composition while staying clean and icon-friendly.

pose: peeking from behind a soft blanket
setting: tiny greenhouse with warm glass reflections
calm tatami room with paper lantern glow
palette: warm cream, pale apricot, soft sage
powder blue, cloud white, muted gold
lavender gray, pearl white, dusty pink
mint green, butter yellow, warm ivory
soft coral, sky blue, oatmeal beige
pale peach, moss green, linen white
rose beige, smoky gray, honey gold
composition: wide negative space on the left for desktop icons
cat placed in the lower right third with calm open background
center subject with very soft blurred edges
low horizon and large clean sky or wall area
diagonal light beam leading toward the cat
symmetrical calm scene with uncluttered top half
macro cozy foreground with spacious background
editorial wallpaper layout with no busy detail near edges
surpriseElement: gentle steam from a mug far in the background
one round cushion shaped like a cloud
